name: Iron Sword
description: A sturdy iron sword, well-balanced and reliable. Standard issue for warriors entering the dungeon.

name: Leather Armor
description: Hardened leather armor offering decent protection without sacrificing mobility. A common choice for dungeon delvers.

name: Iron Ring
description: A simple iron ring engraved with a warding rune. Provides a small boost to max HP and defense.

name: Wooden Shield
description: A reinforced wooden shield banded with iron. Significantly increases defense but reduces agility. Knight-only.

name: Hunter's Bow
description: A well-crafted hunting bow, light and responsive. Excellent accuracy makes it ideal for the archer's art. Archer-only.

name: Runed Oak Staff
description: A gnarled oak staff carved with runes of amplification. Channels arcane energy efficiently. Mage-only.

name: Combat Dagger
description: A double-edged dagger designed for close combat. Fast and deadly in trained hands. Rogue-only.

name: Iron Sword
description: A sturdy blade, well-balanced despite its age. Standard issue for any aspiring knight.

name: Rusty Dagger
description: Short, quick, and sharp enough where it counts. The rust is cosmetic. Mostly.

name: Oak Staff
description: Worn smooth by decades of use. The wood still hums faintly when gripped.

name: Short Bow
description: A compact hunting bow. Lacks range compared to a longbow, but reliable in tight spaces.

name: Leather Cap
description: A simple cap of boiled leather. It won't stop a sword, but it might save you from a glancing blow.

name: Iron Band
description: A plain iron band. Lighter than it looks. Somehow makes you feel quicker on your feet.

name: Chain Gloves
description: Interlocking iron rings woven into leather gloves. Good grip, better protection.

name: Leather Gloves
description: Simple leather gloves lined with wool. Light protection for the hands without sacrificing dexterity.

name: Leather Vest
description: Hardened leather stitched over a wool lining. Standard protection for those who can't afford plate.

name: Blight Ward
description: A tarnished silver pendant etched with old protective symbols. The metal is warm to the touch near corrupted ground.

name: Venom Blade
description: A blackened short sword with a channel running along the fuller. The edge sweats something oily and green.

name: Crude Gem
description: A rough, uncut gemstone pulled from the passage walls. Worth a few coins to the right buyer.

name: Old Coin
description: A coin from a forgotten era. The face is worn smooth but the metal is still good.

name: Violet Shard
description: A fragment of crystallized Hollow corruption. It pulses faintly with an inner light. Scholars pay well for these.

name: Blighted Fang
description: A tooth from a corrupted wolf. The enamel is stained violet and warm to the touch.

name: Bone Fragment
description: A shard of ancient bone, faintly luminous. Worthless in combat, but collectors and scholars pay well for crypt relics.

name: Crypt Blade
description: A sword recovered from a tomb guardian. The blade is cold to the touch and never dulls.

name: Bone Wand
description: A wand carved from a guardian's femur. It channels magic with disturbing efficiency.

name: Shadow Knife
description: A blade that seems to drink the light around it. Impossibly quick in the hand.

name: Crypt Longbow
description: A longbow strung with sinew from something that was never alive. Deadly accurate at range.

name: Chainmail
description: Interlocking iron rings forming a protective shirt. Heavier than leather but far more durable.

name: Iron Helm
description: A solid iron helm with a nose guard. Protects against overhead blows and glancing strikes.

name: Plated Gloves
description: Leather gloves reinforced with riveted iron plates. Good protection without total loss of dexterity.

name: Tomb Ring
description: A silver ring pried from a sarcophagus. The inscription has worn away, but the enchantment hasn't.

name: Crypt Shield
description: A heavy kite shield bearing a faded crest. The metal is cold — unnaturally cold — and blows seem to slide off it.

name: Crypt Crown
description: A tarnished crown from a buried king. The metal whispers when you wear it — guidance from the dead, or madness.

name: Guardian Amulet
description: An amulet bearing the crest of the old Guardians. Its warmth pushes back the chill of the crypt.

name: Warden's Gauntlets
description: Blackened steel gauntlets from the Warden's armory. The joints move with unnatural fluidity, as if the metal remembers how to fight.

name: Crypt Relic
description: A small artifact from the tombs. Its age alone makes it valuable to collectors.

name: Guardian Sigil
description: A metal disc inscribed with the old Guardian's seal. Warm to the touch, even in the deepest cold.

name: Violet Crystal
description: A large crystal of concentrated Hollow energy. It hums at a frequency that sets your teeth on edge.

name: Warden's Blade
description: The sword of the fallen Guardian. Violet light pulses along the edge in a slow heartbeat. It cuts through armor like parchment.

name: Warden's Plate
description: Full plate armor from the Guardian's vault. Cracked where the Hollow seeped through, but still stronger than anything forged today.

name: Hollow Ward
description: An amulet of pale stone carved from the seal itself. It hums against your chest. Debuffs seem to wash over you like water.
